title: eupatorium hebes var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium hebes var. typicum, commonly known as the 'Bath and Kitchen' or 'Hebe', is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Honeysuckle family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Eupatorium hebes var. typicum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies.
